changes.description: Interface layout cleanup: responsive grids, consistent card spacing, statusbar cleanup, overflow fixes.
Release/update announcements removed from operational interface and moved to changelog/release report.
Graph Explorer expanded with node/edge charts, degree histogram, centrality, platform mix, family risk, incident connectivity, claim-incident matrix and evidence readiness.
Added graph_dashboard_v116.json derived from local dataset; no item/source/family records changed.
Replaced broken v116 Graph Explorer override with syntax-checked implementation and working filters/export.
Rebuilt Report Builder as a local workflow with preview and HTML/Markdown/JSON/CSV export.
Cleaned operational release/update text from interface; changelog/release reports remain the place for update notes.

notes: Operational update/release messages should be documented here and in RELEASE_REPORT files, not rendered as dashboard announcement panels.
